output.final_deliverable:
1) Exact H1 text from https://example.com
- H1: "Example Domain"

2) Exact domain of the external link from https://example.com
- External link (full URL) found on the page: https://iana.org/domains/example
- Exact domain extracted from that link: iana.org

3) One URL citation for each visited page (in order)
1. https://example.com
2. https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved

Evidence (from the provided visit results):
- example.com visit result: h1_text = "Example Domain"; links = ["https://iana.org/domains/example"]
- iana.org visit result: page URL = https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved; h1_text = "IANA-managed Reserved Domains"

No required evidence is missing from the provided merged results.
output.action_summary: Extracted exact H1 from example.com ("Example Domain"), extracted the external link URL on that page (https://iana.org/domains/example) and its domain (iana.org), and provided one URL citation for each visited page: https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Evidence is included from the visit results.

merged_results.title: Assemble results: produce H1 text, external link domain, and one citation per page

result.title: Assemble results: produce H1 text, external link domain, and one citation per page

details.intent: After the two visit actions complete, assemble the exact required outputs: (1) exact H1 text from example.com, (2) exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.
dependencies: Outputs from the example.com visit (h1_text, external_link_url, external_link_domain, citation_url_for_example).
details.assembly_plan: 1) Receive extracted fields from the example.com visit and verify non-empty values for h1_text and external_link_url. 2) Use the external_link_domain value as provided (do not modify). 3) Use the citation_url_for_example and citation_url_for_iana as the one URL citation for each visited page. 4) Format a final payload containing: { h1_text, external_link_domain, citations: [ citation_url_for_example, citation_url_for_iana ] } and include brief verification notes stating which page element produced each field.

measurable_outputs.verification_notes: string (short notes linking each field to the source element)

verification_steps: Ensure final_payload.h1_text exactly matches the H1 extracted from example.com visit.
Ensure final_payload.external_link_domain equals the domain parsed from the external link href extracted from example.com visit.
Ensure citations array contains the exact citation URLs returned by the two visit steps.
details.rationale: This think/assembly step consolidates child visit results into the exact deliverables requested by the user and provides verification notes for transparency.
details.goal: Assemble results: produce H1 text, external link domain, and one citation per page
details.original_goal: Assemble results: produce H1 text, external link domain, and one citation per page

621f7191-d368-4d97-8121-17e0611b32f3.title: Visit https://example.com and extract exact H1 and external link

details.intent: Retrieve full HTML/text of example.com, extract the exact H1 text and the page's external link URL(s) and anchor text.
target_facts: Exact H1 text (including whitespace/characters exactly as on the page).
Exact external link URL found on the page (the href value as written on the page).
Exact domain portion of that external link URL (e.g., 'example.org' or 'www.example.org').
One URL to cite for this visited page (the exact visited URL or final redirected URL).
details.extraction_plan: 1) Parse returned page HTML/text and locate the first <h1> element; capture its exact text content (preserve whitespace and punctuation). 2) Find anchor tags (<a>) whose href attribute points to a different domain than example.com (external links). If multiple, select the first external link in document order. 3) Record the exact href string for that external link (do NOT normalize or modify). 4) Derive the domain part exactly as present in the href (the host portion, including subdomain if present, e.g., 'www.iana.org'). 5) Provide a citation URL for this visited page (the exact URL used or final URL after redirects if the visit tool returns that).

measurable_outputs.citation_url_for_example: string (exact URL to cite for example.com visit)

verification_steps: Confirm H1 text is non-empty and matches the page content exactly.
Confirm external_link_url appears in the page HTML and is not a mailto: or anchor-only fragment; prefer http(s) links.
Confirm external_link_domain is parsed from the external_link_url host portion and matches that href exactly (do not guess).
Confirm citation_url_for_example equals the visited URL or the final resolved URL returned by the visit tool.
details.rationale: This visit is required to produce the exact H1 text and to locate the external link and its domain on example.com as requested. The visit will produce machine-verifiable evidence (HTML snippet and exact href).
details.goal: Visit https://example.com and extract exact H1 and external link
details.original_goal: Visit https://example.com and extract exact H1 and external link
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

3fc9b35d-17b2-4caf-a719-d3dd8bf9bb43.title: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and record a citation URL

details.intent: Retrieve the IANA reserved domains page content and produce one precise URL citation for that visited page.
target_facts: One exact URL to cite for the IANA reserved domains page (the visited URL or the final resolved URL).
Optionally capture page title or H1 for verification.
details.extraction_plan: 1) Visit the provided URL and capture the final URL returned by the site (after any redirects). 2) Extract a short verification field such as the page <title> or first H1 to confirm the page identity. 3) Return one URL citation (the exact URL string) for this page.

measurable_outputs.citation_url_for_iana: string (exact URL to cite for the IANA page)

verification_steps: Confirm the citation_url_for_iana is the URL returned by the visit action (not guessed).
Confirm the page title/H1 contains 'IANA' or 'Reserved Domains' to verify correctness.
details.rationale: The user requested a URL citation for the IANA reserved domains page. A direct visit is the authoritative way to capture the exact URL and a verification snippet.
details.goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and record a citation URL
details.original_goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and record a citation URL
